title: Replace baseline trends with live mini-history
description: Issue 6 from the plan: switch HMI trends to a small real time-series buffer, update docs, and add visibility tests that confirm no exact site coordinates become visible.
acceptance_criteria: Trend pages render live history rather than fixture-baseline comparisons, docs are synced, and integration tests prove location privacy on visible paths.
close_reason: Switched trends to live runtime history and added privacy checks

title: Drive plant and meter output from weather
description: Issue 5 from the plan: derive plant power, block power and revenue-meter output from weather, availability and overrides with small realistic losses and asymmetry.
acceptance_criteria: Simulation and register tests prove weather-driven output remains plausible while curtailment, breaker state and block controls keep their current precedence.
close_reason: Implemented weather-driven plant and meter evolution

title: Implement Open-Meteo adapter with cache and leak guards
description: Issue 4 from the plan: integrate Open-Meteo forecast and optional satellite-radiation data behind an internal adapter with caching, fallback behaviour, and strict location privacy.
acceptance_criteria: Provider tests prove reduced internal observations, graceful fallback, and no raw location/provider payload leak into visible or exported paths.
close_reason: Implemented Open-Meteo adapter with cache, fallback, and leak guards

title: Add weather config and deterministic provider abstraction
description: Issue 3 from the plan: add internal geo/weather config fields plus a deterministic offline weather provider and shared provider interface for tests and local runtime.
acceptance_criteria: Config validators and unit tests cover coordinates, refresh/cache settings, and deterministic day-night weather evolution.

title: Add background evolution service and trend ringbuffer
description: Issue 2 from the plan: add a background runtime service that advances snapshot time, evolves shared-truth state, and maintains a small in-memory trend history.
acceptance_criteria: Runtime integration tests prove weather and power can evolve without user writes and trend history fills from the background service.

title: Anchor observed time and freshness in domain state
description: Issue 1 from the plan: add observed_at/last_update_ts to snapshot and assets, make register map snapshot replacement atomic, and switch HMI snapshot time away from fixed fixture start.
acceptance_criteria: Domain and HMI tests prove observed_at advances and no fixed fixture-only snapshot time remains visible.

title: Realistic plant dynamics and weather integration
description: Lebende Zeit, interne Wetterprovider, wettergetriebene Leistungsdynamik und kleine echte Verlaufshistorien fuer den SCADA-Honeypot.

title: Review findings and approve ingress opening
description: Sweep-Ergebnis, Monitoring und Egress/Ingress-Freigaben pruefen und erst danach den externen Ingress freigeben.
close_reason: Ingress findings reviewed and accepted for v1.0.0: public HMI and Modbus are intentional honeypot surfaces; Ops remains protected behind Caddy auth.

title: Run verify-exposed-research on target host
description: Den Sweep auf dem echten Zielhost mit finaler .env fahren und Findings, Runtime-Status und Eventspur sichern.
close_reason: External target deployment sweep passed: HMI, Ops auth, Caddy security headers, trusted proxy source IP and public Modbus read validated.

title: Prepare target-host deployment env
description: Finale deployment-spezifische .env fuer den Zielhost festziehen: Ingress, Egress, Rollen, Monitoring und Findings-Pfade.

title: Target-host exposed-research validation
description: Repo-seitige Gates stehen. Offen ist jetzt der echte Zielhost-Kurs mit deployment-spezifischer .env, erfolgreichem verify-exposed-research-Lauf und dokumentierter Freigabeentscheidung.

title: Backend version log for implemented features
description: Add an ops backend version/change log page that records implemented features and fixes after the credential aggregation work. Decide the initial version baseline and expose new backend-facing changes in a readable history.
acceptance_criteria: Ops backend has a version log page or section; each implemented feature/fix can be recorded with version/date/summary; initial baseline version is chosen and documented; docs/tests cover the visible route.
notes: Implementation started: add protected ops backend version/change log after credential aggregation.
close_reason: Implemented protected Ops backend version log with v0.9.x baseline, tests and documentation.
